H1: EU CLIMATE-CHANGE LEGISLATION  
CLAIM: COMPONENTS:  
  • CLIMATE/ENERGY-PACKAGE  
  • ETS: DIR2003/87/EC ∧ AM DIR2009/29/EC ∧ DEC2004/101/EC(KYOTO-MECH)  
  • EFFORT-SHARING: DEC2009/136/EC  
  • RENEWABLE-ENERGY(RED): DIR2009/28/EC  
  • CCS: DIR2009/31/EC  
  • ENERGY-EFFICIENCY: DIR2012/27/EU  
  • MRV: REG2013/165/EU(GHG MONITORING/REPORTING)  
  • TRANSPORT/FUEL-QUALITY: DIR98/70/EC ∧ AM DIR2009/30/EC  
  • F-GASES: REG842/2006  
  • FORESTS/AGRI-ACCOUNTING: DEC2014/101/EU
